---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Nathan Brouwer"
date: "July 24, 2018"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



\[
N_{t+1} = \lambda*N_{t}
\]


\[
N_{t+1}/N_{t} = \lambda
\]

\[
\frac{N_{t+1}N_{t}| = \lambda
\]
